resources.string: Cambiar de escuela o de cuenta de educación en casa
Estudio en casa, para una certificación o a mi propio ritmo.
Ingresa el código de tu escuela.
Usa solo letras minúsculas, números y guiones.
Los códigos de escuela tienen como máximo 32 caracteres.
Los códigos de escuela tienen al menos 2 caracteres.
Ejemplo: example abre example.lextures.com. Usa local para un servidor de desarrollo.
Tu escuela o distrito proporciona un código corto para iniciar sesión. Introdúcelo para conectar con su entorno de Lextures.
Ingresa el código de tu escuela
Soy estudiante o educador en una escuela que usa Lextures.
Elige la opción que coincida con cómo inicias sesión.
La recuperación de contraseña estará disponible en una futura actualización.
This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
Could not send a magic link. Try again.
We will email you a one-time link that signs you in without a password.
If an account exists with that email, you will receive a sign-in link shortly.
No se pudo conectar con el servidor. ¿Está la API en ejecución?
Sign-in was cancelled. Try again when you\'re ready.
Single sign-on did not complete. Try again or use another method.
Your organization requires single sign-on. Use the button above.
Usa el correo que usa tu curso o escuela. Las opciones de SSO aparecen cuando tu organización las conecta.
That code did not work. Try again.
Passkeys are not available on this device.
Add this account in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
Your organization requires a second sign-in step. Add an authenticator app or passkey.
Enter the code from your authenticator app, use a passkey, or a backup code.
Una cuenta para cursos, tareas y mensajes. Si tu escuela usa SSO, podrás iniciar sesión así más tarde.
Sign in with Apple could not be completed. Try again or use another method.
Continue with Google could not be completed. Try again or use another method.
Elige el idioma de menús, botones y demás textos de la interfaz.
No se pudo guardar la preferencia de idioma.
No tienes adaptaciones activas en este momento. Si esperabas alguna, comunícate con tu institución.
Estos apoyos aprobados se aplican automáticamente. Comunícate con tu institución para hacer cambios.
No se pudieron cargar tus adaptaciones.
Lectura en voz alta (texto a voz)
Se recomienda el modo de distracción reducida
Voz a texto para respuestas escritas
Apoyos aprobados aplicados a tu trabajo
Shown as "Schedule Advising Appointment" on the student dashboard (EAB Navigate, Calendly, etc.).
Show at-risk banner on student dashboard when flagged by degree audit
Configure the advising appointment link and degree-audit provider for student dashboards.
Advising integration is not enabled. Turn on Advising integration under Global platform settings.
You need permission to manage AI models, prompts, and usage reports.
Choose AI models, edit system prompts, and review platform-wide usage and spend.
Models, system prompts, and usage reports.
Platform-wide key for AI generation. Prefer configuring providers under Intelligence on web (BYOK). Leave unchanged to keep the current key; clear the field and save to remove it.
Text model used when setting up course structure and content.
Choose models for course setup, flashcards, vibe activities, grading, and image generation. Refresh the catalog from your configured AI provider when available.
Feature models and AI provider credentials (BYOK).
Text model used when generating AI study flashcards from notebook notes.
Text model used for the SpeedGrader grading agent.
Used when generating course hero images.
Add AI provider credentials (bring-your-own-key) and save so AI features can run. On web, use Settings → Intelligence → Models to configure OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure, Bedrock, or Vertex.
Could not load models. Showing a static fallback list.
Text model used when generating interactive HTML vibe activities.
Edit platform system prompts used by AI features. Changes are audited.
View and edit audited platform prompts.
Platform-wide AI provider spend and usage. Data is recorded from successful AI calls.
No AI usage recorded in this window.
No course usage in this window.
No user usage in this window.
You need the rbac:manage permission to review archived courses.
This removes all modules, assignments, quizzes, submissions, grades, enrollments, uploaded files, and related data. This cannot be undone.
Archived courses are hidden from catalogs and search. Restore a course to bring it back, or permanently delete it to remove all content, files, submissions, and enrollments.
No archived courses in this organization.
No archived courses match your search.
Restore or permanently delete archived courses
Restore this course to the catalog?
You need admin console access to view the audit log.
Read-only administrative audit events for your organization.
No audit events match this filter.
Could not load the audit log.
Open full audit log on web
You need the rbac:manage permission to manage courses.
Review course volume by status, open matching lists from metrics, and search by code or title.
Enter a course code or title above, or tap a metric card.
Browse platform courses and open dashboards
Published courses that are not archived.
Courses created in the past 7 days.
Unpublished courses that are not archived.
Try another metric or search by code or title.
Tap a metric to inspect matching courses.
Full course admin tools on a larger screen.
You need permission to manage integrations and provisioning.
Review cloud file picker providers and enable or disable them. Credentials are configured on the web.
No cloud providers are configured yet.
Google Drive, OneDrive, and Dropbox status.
This change can affect logins, sync, or content pickers. It is recorded in the audit log.
No integration sections are available for this platform.
Check LTI, SCIM, cloud storage, LRS, and OER status. Full credential setup stays on the web.
LTI, SCIM, cloud, LRS, and OER status.
Review Learning Record Store endpoints and enable or disable them. Credentials are never shown on mobile.
No LRS endpoints are configured yet.
Registered LTI 1.3 parent platforms and external tools. Toggle active state or configure on web.
No LTI platforms or tools are registered yet.
Enable or disable open educational resource catalogs available in courses.
No OER providers are configured yet.
SCIM provisioning health: active bearer tokens and recent events. Create or revoke tokens on the web.
No SCIM activity for this institution yet.
Sync status and recent provisioning events.
Bearer tokens and credentials are never shown on mobile. Configure tokens on the web.
Secrets and credentials are never shown here. Use the web to edit keys.
Could not update integration. Try again.
You need rbac:manage or org-units admin permission to manage org branding and AI settings.
Allowed models (one per line; empty = all)
Leave blank to allow all models supported by your provider.
Control which AI features are enabled for your organization and which models may be used.
Could not load AI governance settings.
Could not save AI governance settings.
Enter a new key to replace the stored secret. Leave the placeholder unchanged to keep the current key.
Choose which AI backend serves your organization. BYOK keys are stored encrypted and never returned after save.
Could not load AI provider settings.
Could not save AI provider settings.
This color may not meet WCAG AA contrast against white (need 4.5:1 for normal text).
Shown as the sender name on password-reset and similar emails.
Logo must be 4 MB or smaller.
PNG, JPEG, GIF, or SVG. Shown on sign-in and navigation.
Update organization branding and review AI governance and provider settings from your phone. Custom domain DNS setup stays on the web.
Logo, colors, AI governance, and provider settings
No organization id is available on your session.
You need rbac:manage or org-units admin permission to manage organizations and terms.
Review organizations, the department hierarchy, and academic terms. Rename units or adjust term dates on mobile — use the web for deep restructuring.
Review org structure and edit term dates
No org units are configured for this organization.
No academic terms configured. Add a term to organize courses by semester.
Changing term dates may affect course schedules that inherit these dates. The change is audited on the server.
Create terms, delete terms, and manage the full academic calendar on a larger screen.
Add units, move branches, and restructure the hierarchy on a larger screen.
You need the rbac:manage permission to manage people.
Search users by name or email. Invite new users, suspend compromised accounts, and review roles from your phone.
Enter a name or email above to search for users.
Search, invite, and manage user accounts
Users who can currently sign in.
Try another metric or invite a user.
Tap a metric to inspect matching accounts.
Users with learning activity in the past 30 days.
Accounts created in the past 7 days.
Every non-system account on the platform.
Resend setup email to this user?
You cannot suspend your own account.
Bulk import, delete accounts, and full people dashboard on a larger screen.
You need permission to manage global platform settings.
Secret values are omitted. Use the web settings page to edit secrets and advanced configuration.
This change affects everyone on the platform and is recorded in the audit log.
Review non-secret platform configuration and use guarded toggles during an incident.
Edit secrets and advanced configuration on web
Review platform configuration and safely toggle features.
Allow users to send product feedback.
Enable the persistent AI tutor experience.
Only incident-safe flags can be changed on mobile. Identity, infrastructure, billing, and mobile access flags remain web-only.
Could not update this feature. The effective state was reloaded.
You need the rbac:manage permission to manage roles.
Review which permissions each role includes. Assign roles to users when needed — create or edit permission strings on the web.
Review roles and assign them to users
No users have this role yet.
You cannot assign yourself a role that grants admin access from mobile.
Create permission strings and edit the full matrix on a larger screen.
Register your institution\'s webhook URL. When a student requests an official transcript, Lextures sends a POST request to this endpoint with the student\'s information.
Webhook URL, pickup instructions, and delivery failures.
These requests failed to deliver to your webhook endpoint.
Transcripts is not enabled for this platform. Turn on Transcripts under Global platform settings.
Shown to students who choose in-person pickup. Leave blank to hide the pickup option.
Registrar office, Room 101 Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–4:00 PM Bring a photo ID
When set, requests include an X-Lextures-Signature header (HMAC-SHA256 of the body).
POST-only endpoint. Receives JSON with requestId, requestedAt, delivery preferences, and student profile fields.
You need admin permission and the mobile admin settings flag to manage transcripts and advising.
Enable Transcripts or Advising integration under Global platform settings.
Review and update official transcript delivery settings and the advising integration used on student dashboards.
Configure transcript webhooks and advising integration.
Your advisor has flagged you as at risk. Schedule a meeting to review your degree plan.
Connect to the internet to schedule an appointment.
When your advisor shares notes, they will appear here.
Degree audit is not configured. Contact your advisor for degree planning help.
Data last updated %1$s. Check your SIS for the latest audit.
Notes and appointments from your academic advisor.
Advising features are not enabled on this platform.
Could not load the announcements channel.
This course does not have an announcements channel yet.
Los anuncios de la escuela aparecerán aquí.
This assignment is closed for submissions.
Your file is locked until your instructor requests a revision.
File must be 20 MB or smaller.
That file type is not allowed for this assignment.
This assignment does not accept submissions.
Text submits queue when offline; file uploads need a connection.
The due date has passed and late submissions are not allowed.
Saved — will submit when you\'re back online.
Could not submit. Please try again.
Activa la asistencia en la configuración del curso para usar lista y auto-registro.
Start a roll call for today, then mark the roster.
No students enrolled for this session scope.
Se requiere autenticación multifactor. Completa el inicio de sesión en la app web por ahora.
Respuesta de inicio de sesión inesperada.
Tu sesión se cerró de forma remota. Vuelve a iniciar sesión para continuar.
Select students and a positive category, then award points.
No students enrolled in this course.
Log an incident or referral for one student.
Purchases you make will appear here.
Your purchase may take a moment to appear.
You\'ll complete checkout securely in your browser.
Digital course purchases open in your browser per app store policy.
Confirming your purchase with the server…
Usa %1$s o el código de tu dispositivo para continuar.
Requiere biometría después de un minuto en segundo plano.
This board is no longer available to you.
You need admin permission and the mobile boards advanced flag.
Org board analytics, quotas, and policies
Overview and policies for collaboration boards.
Archived boards are hidden from the default list. You can show them again with Show archived.
No se pudo mover la tarjeta.
Opciones de disposición de la tarjeta
Add a short description so everyone can understand the image.
Please add alt text for the image.
Record or attach audio before posting.
Lextures needs the camera to photograph work for this board.
Drawing cards can be created on the web. You can still view them here.
Microphone access is required to record audio.
Lextures needs the microphone to record a short audio reflection for this board.
Storage limit reached. Ask an administrator to increase the course storage quota.
Create a board to start collecting ideas, media, and reflections.
Pellizca para zoom · arrastra para pan · mantén pulsada una tarjeta para moverla
¿Salir del lienzo? Las posiciones se conservan pero pueden no verse en el nuevo diseño.
This content couldn\'t be posted. Please revise and try again.
Approval mode and blocking filter are required for courses with minors.
This file was blocked by scanning and cannot be shown.
Delete this card? This cannot be undone.
You don\'t have permission to change this card.
This card type isn\'t supported on mobile yet. Open it on the web.
Add a text note, photo, link, file, or audio reflection to get started.
You don\'t have permission to react or comment.
Too many reports. Please try again later.
A teacher will review this report.
Sección eliminada; las tarjetas pasaron a Sin ordenar
External link and public sharing are disabled for this organisation.
This share link is invalid, expired, or revoked.
External sharing is blocked for courses with minors.
Control who can see and contribute to this board.
Pull to refresh, or add a card with the + button.
A new card appeared on the board
%1$d new cards appeared on the board
This board is locked or frozen; changes can\'t be saved right now.
Copy structure only, or include posts.
No board templates match your filters.
Including student posts may share student work. Structure-only is recommended.
Create a board from this template
Boards are turned off for this course.
Send an emergency broadcast to %1$s? Recipients will get an immediate push notification.
Emergency broadcasts notify everyone immediately and require acknowledgement.
The import was stopped. You can start again when you are ready.
Connect with your Canvas base URL and a personal access token.
Your Canvas token stays in memory for this import only — it is never saved on this device.
No teacher courses were returned for this token. Check the URL and token, then try again.
Could not list Canvas courses. Check the URL and token.
Server did not return an import job id.
Connect to the internet to import from Canvas.
Select a Canvas course to import.
Sign in to import from Canvas.
Canvas URL must start with http:// or https://.
Optional. Off by default — enable later in course settings if needed.
Enrollments and grades can include student information. Only import what you need.
Your Canvas course is ready in Lextures.
You do not have an existing course to import into yet.
Try a different search or filter.
Could not enroll in this course.
You are not allowed to enroll in this course.
This course could not be found.
Search or browse to discover courses.
Full editing works best on a larger screen.
Collaborative documents for this course will appear here.
Open "%1$s" on the web to edit the whiteboard.
Acepta la invitación para unirte y ver el contenido del curso, o recházala para quitarlo de tu lista.
No se pudo actualizar la invitación. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Tienes una invitación a este curso
You do not have permission to edit this course.
AI alt-text suggestions are unavailable right now.
Percentage of images with descriptive alt text or marked decorative.
All images in this course have alt text or are marked decorative.
Save is blocked for pages with missing alt text until images are updated.
Review image alt-text across course pages and assignments. Fix missing descriptions so content meets accessibility expectations.
All images in this item now have alt text.
This content type cannot be edited on mobile yet. Open the course on web to add alt text.
Opens alt-text editor for this item
Alt text saved. Coverage will update after sync.
You need permission to edit course modules to view or restore archived content.
Archived module items are hidden from students but stay in the course. Restoring an item returns it to the module outline.
Could not load or restore archived content.
Restore queued — it will sync when you are back online.
Item restored to the module outline.
Org administrators manage district blueprint courses here. Ask your platform admin for access.
This course is linked to blueprint %1$s.
Designate a master course and push structural updates to linked child courses. Teachers keep local items they add outside the blueprint copy.
Child courses cannot be toggled as blueprints until unlinked.
Turn this course into a master blueprint course.
Child course linked and initial sync completed.
Child shells must have no modules yet. Linking copies all blueprint modules and items once.
Link at least one child course before pushing updates.
Enable blueprint designation to link child courses and push structural updates.
Connect to the internet to link or unlink child courses.
Connect to the internet to push blueprint updates.
This will apply blueprint structural changes to all linked child courses. Continue?
Applies blueprint changes to all linked children. Locally added items in children are preserved.
This course is a district blueprint master.
Unlink %1$s from this blueprint? Copied course content is not removed.
Require captions before publishing module items that embed course videos.
Allow students from partner institutions with an active sharing agreement to enroll in this course.
Turning off %1$s hides it from the course menu until you enable it again.
Allow mastery-based branching between modules. Instructors configure rules on each module in the course outline.
Conversational AI tutor side-panel available on all course pages.
Take roll call or run self-report check-ins; optionally add sessions to the gradebook.
Month, week, and agenda views of assignment and content due dates for this course.
Real-time co-editing with shared rich-text docs and whiteboards for group work.
Offer a short adaptive placement assessment after enrollment.
Threaded discussion boards with replies, upvotes, graded threads, and instructor moderation.
Course-wide channels and messages, including uploads and real-time updates.
Course file space where instructors and students can upload, organize, and share materials.
Let learners request progressive hints and unlock worked examples during quizzes.
Live and homework interactive quizzes with join codes and leaderboards.
Virtual classroom meetings — shows the Live Sessions menu item and scheduling page.
Choose one-question-at-a-time or kiosk delivery on quizzes.
Record misconception events when tagged distractors are selected and show targeted remediation.
Show a Translate button on feed posts, discussion posts, and inbox messages.
Personal notes workspace for this course.
Let instructors define availability windows and students book 1-on-1 appointment slots.
Store quiz items in a reusable bank with optional random pools per attempt.
Author district-formatted report cards with comment banks and PDF release to the parent portal.
Split one course into multiple sections with separate rosters and optional per-section due dates.
Let learners use the global review queue for SRS-eligible question-bank items.
Map concepts to standards codes and view per-standard coverage for this course.
Shared visual boards for posts, media, and class collaboration.
Interactive canvas for teachers to draw diagrams and save named boards.
Turn tools on or off for everyone in this course. Disabled tools disappear from the course menu.
Define categories and what percent of the course grade each represents.
Assign each quiz, assignment, or gradable content page to an assignment group.
No quizzes, assignments, or gradable content pages yet.
Includes A+, B−, and similar variants.
Standard A through F without plus/minus.
Choose how final grades are labeled for this course.
Controls how gradebook and My Grades show scores. Stored scores stay as points.
Band %1$s min percent must be between 0 and 100.
Letter bands must have strictly increasing minimum percentages.
Add at least one letter band.
Complete threshold must be between 0 and 100.
Each assignment group needs a name.
The lowest letter band must start at 0%.
Pass threshold must be between 0 and 100.
This removes the agent configuration for this activity.
No grading agents yet. Create one for an assignment or quiz.
Configure AI grading agents for assignments and quizzes. Run agents from SpeedGrader on web or mobile.
Every gradable activity already has an agent.
Full template editing is available on web. You can start a new agent from a template below.
Advanced workflow editing is available on web. Changes here update the agent prompt and settings.
Image must be 10 MB or smaller.
JPEG or PNG, up to 10 MB.
This will erase existing modules and related content, then apply the backup. Continue?
This will add new items from the backup without removing existing content. Continue?
This will update this course from the backup and remove outline items not in the file. Continue?
Download the full course bundle as one JSON file: syllabus, modules, assignments, quizzes, grading, roster, and settings.
Backups may include student-authored content. Be careful when sharing the file.
That backup is too large to import on this device. Use the web app instead.
Restore this course from a JSON backup produced by Lextures.
That file is not valid JSON.
Import file must contain a JSON object.
Remove all modules and related content, then apply the backup.
Keep existing content and add items whose ids are not already present.
Update this course from the backup and remove outline items not listed in the file.
QTI, Common Cartridge, and Canvas imports are available on the web app.
Introduce un importe válido con hasta dos decimales.
El precio supera el máximo permitido.
Los cursos de pago deben costar al menos 0.50.
Publica este curso en el mercado y define una tarifa. Déjala en blanco para Gratis.
Los estudiantes pueden descubrirlo e inscribirse cuando está activado.
No se pudo cargar la configuración del mercado.
Publica el curso antes de listarlo en el mercado.
No se pudo guardar la configuración del mercado.
Link graded work below. Enrolled learners: %1$s.
Combined average from linked graded work: %1$s%%
This removes the outcome and every mapping to assignments or quiz items.
What should learners be able to do?
Start with a short, learner-facing title. Link graded work after it is saved.
Define what learners should demonstrate and connect graded work to track class-level progress.
Tie this outcome to a module assignment or quiz.
No links yet — use the form below to connect evidence.
Pick a question for this quiz.
Enable plagiarism and AI-authorship checks for this course
Configure course-wide originality scanning. Assignments can still opt out individually.
When enabled, student submission text may be sent to the selected provider for analysis. Review your institution\'s data-sharing policy before turning this on.
Similarity and AI-authorship scores are signals, not proof of misconduct.
Instructors are alerted when similarity meets or exceeds this percentage.
Threshold must be a number between 0 and 100.
Students can access a published course.
This section is available on web for now. Mobile support is coming soon.
Archive %1$s? Students stay enrolled but the section is hidden from active lists.
Only organization administrators can configure cross-list groups.
All active sections are in this group.
Link teaching sections so enrollments appear together in the gradebook. Content stays on the primary section\'s course shell.
Add at least two active sections before you can cross-list them.
Students remain enrolled under their own section code. You can link the section again later.
Turn on Course sections under the Features tab first, then return here to add sections and overrides.
No sections yet. Create one below.
Add sections to split your course roster. Each section can have its own instructor and optional due-date overrides on assignments.
Connect to the internet to create or edit sections. Reads may show cached data.
Pick a section and assignment, then set a due date that applies only to students in that section.
No students in this section yet.
Creating a locale may trigger machine-translation jobs when you publish content. Coverage starts at 0% until items are published.
Añade un idioma de destino para seguir la cobertura y el glosario.
Source language is English. Saving replaces the target for the same source term.
No glossary terms yet. Add key phrases so translations stay consistent.
Añade variantes de idioma, gestiona el glosario y revisa la cobertura. La edición completa de segmentos está en la web.
Status is read-only on mobile. Publish drafts from the web translations editor.
Coverage is read-only. Edit glossary terms below. Segment translation authoring is available on web.
Choose a content page for the course home
Los cursos en los que te inscribas aparecerán aquí.
Los módulos y tareas aparecerán aquí cuando se publiquen.
Las calificaciones aparecerán aquí cuando se califiquen las tareas.
The course was already created and will stay in your Courses list.
Importing a Canvas course on mobile is almost ready. Use the web app for now, or create from scratch.
Your competency-based course is ready. Open it to add competencies, outcomes, and assessments.
Each competency becomes one published module. Add sub-outcomes and an assessment for each.
Add at least one competency (course outcome).
Competency “%1$s”: add at least one sub-outcome.
Competency %1$s: enter a title (this becomes the module name).
Could not create competencies. Try again.
Could not create the course. Try again.
Could not finish setup. Try again.
Could not apply the syllabus template. Try again.
Optional — you can skip and add modules later.
Organized around outcomes and assessments. Add competencies on the course page after creation.
Modules, assignments, and quizzes in a fixed structure.
Bring in a Canvas course you already teach.
How do you want to start?
Name the course, pick a syllabus template, then add a module or competencies.
Choose a starter syllabus template or start blank.
No syllabus sections — write your own later in course settings.
Daily flow, projects, tools, and conduct for short high-intensity programs.
Learning outcomes, weekly rhythm, texts, assessment, and campus policies in one place.
Term dates, grading categories, expectations, and contact — tuned for secondary classes.
Welcome new hires or members: role expectations, resources, and first-week checklist.
Goals, pacing, milestones, and how learners get unstuck without fixed meeting times.
Complete a self-paced course to earn your first certificate.
Los cursos en los que te inscribas aparecerán aquí.
Nada vence esta semana. ¡Disfruta el respiro!
No se pudo cargar tu panel.
Inicia un hilo para comenzar la conversación.
No se pudieron cargar los debates.
No se pudo publicar tu mensaje.
Publica tu respuesta para desbloquear el resto del hilo.
Pega un enlace https a una imagen cuadrada.
URL de la imagen de avatar
No se pudo cargar tu perfil.
No se pudieron guardar los cambios. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Nombre, foto y datos de contacto
You have already submitted this evaluation.
Your feedback is anonymous. Your responses cannot be linked back to you.
There are no released evaluation results for this course yet.
There is no active course evaluation at this time.
Your response has been recorded. Your feedback is anonymous.
At least 5 responses are required to protect anonymity.
Not enough responses to display results
Please answer all required questions before submitting.
No se pudo cargar el feed.
Tell us what\'s on your mind
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Tell us what\'s on your mind — a bug, idea, or anything else…
You\'re offline — try again when you\'re back online.
We read every note; we may not reply individually. Your message is shared with Lextures staff.
You\'re sending feedback too quickly. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Downloaded course files will be removed from this device. You can download them again when online.
Preview is not available for this file type. Download it or open in another app.
Files uploaded to this course will appear here.
This file is not available offline. Download it while connected.
You opted out of leaderboards. Your rank is hidden from other learners.
Leaderboard is not available for this course.
Keep learning to earn milestone badges.
Enroll in a course to see its leaderboard.
Your streak is at risk — study today to keep it going.
Your streak ends in about %1$d hours.
No collaborative documents linked to this group yet.
When your instructor assigns you to a group, it will appear here.
Course files are shown here. Group-only files may require the web app.
This group has %1$d members. Post in discussion to coordinate.
Hall passes are not enabled on this platform.
Pass requested — waiting for teacher approval.
Waiting for your teacher to approve this pass.
Request a timed hall pass for this section.
Active and pending hall passes appear here.
Revise las calificaciones, asistencia y trabajo próximo de los estudiantes vinculados.
Secondary destinations will appear here when they apply to your role.
This destination is coming in a future update.
Search is coming in a future update. You can still find courses from the Courses tab.
When you have courses to teach, grading backlog and shortcuts appear here.
La actividad del curso y las actualizaciones aparecerán aquí.
%1$s of %2$s hours toward your weekly goal
Only you can see these entries.
You\'ve put in study time but quiz scores aren\'t improving much — try practice tests or teaching concepts back to yourself.
Enable study stats, coaching tips, and private journal
Log in daily to build your streak
When the system flags students, they will appear here.
See who may need help and why

Hi %1$s,
I noticed %2$s in our course and wanted to check in. Let me know if you need help.
Risk scores are predicted from course signals — not a final determination.
Insights appear after enough class activity is recorded.
Long-lived credentials for API tools and MCP agents.
You have an active subscription URL. Regenerate to view and copy the link.
Subscribe to deadlines in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
Generate a URL to subscribe in your calendar app.
Anyone with your feed URL can see assignment titles and due dates. Do not share it publicly.
The old link will stop working immediately.
Manage credentials and feeds that connect Lextures to other apps and AI agents.
API keys, calendar feeds, and MCP
Connect Cursor, Claude Desktop, or other MCP clients using an access key with the mcp:connect scope.
You won\'t see this again. Store it somewhere safe.
Org-scoped credentials for SIS sync, webhooks, and institutional automation.
Un recorrido guiado por la navegación, las actividades de aprendizaje y dónde obtener ayuda.

Un vistazo rápido a cómo está configurado este cuestionario.
Entrega esta tarea desde la app web.
Study activity by day and hour
See what Lextures has learned about how you learn — and exactly where each insight comes from.
Keep learning — as you engage with courses, quizzes, and study tools, insights will appear here. We never guess before there is enough evidence.
See how you learn and manage your profile
Could not load your learner profile. Try again in a moment.
No detailed evidence is available for this insight.
The content formats and pacing that fit you best.
This section could not be loaded. Other sections are still available.
Not enough data yet for this section.
Topics and subjects you engage with most.
How you persist, seek help, and consolidate learning.
Concepts you have mastered and areas to develop.
When and how consistently you study.

Your learner profile is built automatically from your activity across courses. It is never entered manually, and you own it. Each insight shows where it came from, when it was last updated, and how confident we are.
Consistency score %2$d%% with about %1$s active days per week.
How thoroughly you work through content
Insight details are not available yet.
Help-seeking style: %1$s; about %2$s hints per attempt.
How you engage with each format
You engage most with %1$s content (%2$d%% affinity).
You tend to work through content at a %1$s pace.
You study most on %1$s around %2$s (%3$d%% of activity).
Your peak study window is still emerging.
Typical session about %2$d minutes; %1$s sessions per active week.
Current streak %1$d days; longest streak %2$d days.
Download a portable copy, pause updates, or permanently reset your learner profile.
Exports a JSON copy of your profile
That action could not be completed. Try again in a moment.
Your profile will stay as it is and will not be updated from new activity until you resume.
This permanently deletes all profile insights and evidence. It cannot be undone.
Lextures will start updating your profile again from your learning activity.
You\'re offline. Showing your last saved profile. Controls need a connection.
Connect to the internet to pause, resume, reset, or download your profile.
Your learner profile is not being updated right now. Resume updates when you are ready, or manage your profile below.
Could not record usage, but you can still open the resource.
Catalog matches show bibliographic details. Your instructor adds licensed course readings to the course Library section.
This catalog item requires library authentication. Use Open on web to access it through your institution.
E-reserve and library readings assigned to this course will appear here.
This resource works best on a larger screen or in your browser.
This Leganto reading list must be opened through your library portal. Use Open on web for the full experience.
Could not load this library resource.
This resource is not available to open on mobile yet. Try Open on web or contact your instructor.
Try a different search term or check spelling.
This library resource could not be found.
This resource is ready to open. Usage is recorded for licensing reports.
Search failed. Try again when you are online.
Search the library catalog or OER providers to discover readings and openly licensed content.

Your instructor will post live sessions here when class is scheduled.

Nickname must be 24 characters or fewer.

No se pudo abrir este curso.

Explora el catálogo para encontrar cursos acordes a tu objetivo.
Tu panel está personalizado desde el primer día.
Cinco preguntas breves nos ayudan a sugerir el curso adecuado. Puedes omitir sin penalización.
No se pudo completar la configuración inicial.
No se pudo cargar la configuración inicial.
No se pudo guardar el progreso.
No se pudo omitir la configuración inicial.
p. ej. Quiero aprender Python para julio
Independiente de los términos del servicio. Desactivado por defecto.
Elige un tema y describe tu objetivo.
Personalicemos tu ruta de aprendizaje en unos cinco minutos. Puedes omitir cualquier paso.

Note the file name or link (full upload on web).
This attempt was flagged for review.
A focus-loss event was recorded. Leaving the exam may be flagged for review.
For the strongest lock, turn on Guided Access in Settings before you begin (triple-click the side button).
Kiosk mode: stay in this app. Leaving may be logged.
You cannot go back to change previous answers after you continue.
Leaving the app or taking screenshots may be logged for instructor review.
Hints follow the exam settings and any accommodations on your account.
You cannot go back to change previous answers after you continue.
Hints follow the exam settings and any accommodations on your account.
This exam is delivered one question at a time.
Screen pinning could not be enabled automatically. Use your device’s screen pinning setting if your instructor requires it.

This is how the quiz appears to learners. Nothing you enter here is saved.

Estos dispositivos y navegadores pueden acceder a tu cuenta. Cierra sesión en los que no reconozcas.
Solo este dispositivo tiene la sesión iniciada ahora mismo.
No se pudieron cargar las sesiones activas.
Consulta dónde has iniciado sesión y cierra sesión en dispositivos perdidos.
No se pudo cerrar sesión en ese dispositivo.
No se pudieron cerrar las otras sesiones.
¿Cerrar sesión en todos los demás dispositivos? Tendrán que volver a iniciar sesión. Este dispositivo permanecerá conectado.

You need admin permission to open system settings on mobile.

Choose a course for tutoring help, or ask from your notebooks below.
Questions without a course use your saved notebooks.
You have reached your monthly AI interaction limit.
AI tutor is not available for your account.
This feature sends your input to an AI model for processing. You can opt out anytime in account settings.
Save notes in a notebook first, then you can ask here.
AI tutor needs an internet connection.
Your teacher set this mode for you.
Use a simpler layout with bigger buttons for younger learners.
